name: Fettucine with Low-Fat Alfredo Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 cup ricotta cheese -- at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to a warm setting.
2. In a blender, combine the ricotta, milk, and parmesan. Blend until creamy.
3. Cook the fettucine according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
4. Add butter to the cooked pasta. Mix in the ricotta mixture, parsley, salt, and pepper.
5. Serve with additional grated parmesan on top.
